mapper.sql: t.ID, t.TITLE, t.QUESTION_CONTENT, t.STATUS, t.USER_ID, t.USER_NAME, t.ADMIN_REPLY, t.REPLY_ADMIN_ID, t.REPLY_ADMIN_NAME, t.REPLY_TIME, t.CLOSE_BY, t.CLOSE_BY_NAME, t.CLOSE_TIME, t.CREATED_BY, t.CREATION_DATE, t.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t.ORG_IDENTITY
mapper.update: update CMJT_FEEDBACK_ISSUE set ADMIN_REPLY = #{adminReply}, REPLY_ADMIN_ID = #{replyAdminId}, REPLY_ADMIN_NAME = #{replyAdminName}, REPLY_TIME = #{replyTime}, STATUS = #{status}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate} where ID = #{id}

update CMJT_FEEDBACK_ISSUE set STATUS = #{status}, CLOSE_BY = #{closeBy}, CLOSE_BY_NAME = #{closeByName}, CLOSE_TIME = #{closeTime}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate} where ID = #{id}
